title: DotNetCodeGenerationConfig
description: V2 configuration for .NET code generation. Produces C# early-bound entity classes, typed request/response wrappers, SDK message constants, and optionally XML metadata.

$schema.description: A field for the JSON schema specification: https://json-schema.org/

language.description: LCID for label localization. null = org base language.

entities.description: Entity scope — defines which entities to include via additive mechanisms.

fromSolutions.description: Solution unique names. All entities in these solutions are added to the scope.

mask.description: Wildcard pattern (e.g. 'contoso_*') to auto-include matching entities.

requests.description: SDK message names (actions, custom APIs, built-in messages). Presence generates SDK message name constants and typed Request/Response classes for entries with parameters.

optionSets.description: Global OptionSet logical names to generate as standalone constants.

output.description: Controls target framework and which artifacts are generated.

target.description: 'Modern' = net8.0+ (nullable, implicit usings). 'Framework' = .NET Framework 4.6.2 (plugins, no nullable).

virtual.description: Make generated entity properties virtual (for mocking/proxying).

editableReadOnly.description: Generate setters even for read-only attributes.

include.description: Controls which optional sections are included in generated entity classes. All default to true except metadata.

options.description: Generate nested Options class with OptionSet value constants.

logicalNames.description: Generate nested LogicalNames class with attribute name constants.

relations.description: Generate nested Relations class with relationship schema name constants.

metadata.description: Generate XML metadata files. Opt-in — most projects don't need raw metadata XML.
